prompts.title: Existing workflow under pressure
prompts.prompt: Use Architecture Explainer to produce an architecture explainer with system boundaries, component roles, flows, tradeoffs, and known complexity hotspots for the current workstream.
minimum_expectations: State the workflow objective in plain language.
Produce an architecture explainer with system boundaries, component roles, flows, tradeoffs, and known complexity hotspots with explicit structure.
Call out missing information and the next decision.

prompts.title: Partial inputs
prompts.prompt: Draft the strongest version of an architecture explainer with system boundaries, component roles, flows, tradeoffs, and known complexity hotspots using only the available inputs and list what is missing.
minimum_expectations: Keep the output usable even when some inputs are missing.

prompts.title: Decision review
prompts.prompt: Summarize the output from Architecture Explainer for an operator or leader who needs the decision-ready version.
minimum_expectations: Highlight the recommendation or key conclusion.
